Choose the right option to fill in the gap in the following sentence.

‘The family ____ divided in their opinions.’
The students, accompanied by their teacher, ___ going to the field trip. Choose the appropriate verb from the options.
What is the antonym of the word 'flat'?
The king was exiled ____ the kingdom.
Physics ____ with the structure of matter and how the fundamental constituents of the universe interact. Choose the correct option.
A synonym for ‘Frustrate’ is-

He was faced _____ difficulties.
Synonym of the word ‘Embellish’ is-
Slow and steady ____ the race.
Wish I ____ there.
Which one is the incorrect spelling?
Writing letters to strangers ____ become a lost art.
The antonym of the word 'hazardous' is-
Choose the correct spelling.
